window_summary: This window tracks the recent FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release stream from version 5.12.0 through 7.2.0, covering new icons, brand updates, bug fixes, and major version transitions.

chunks.title: Release 5.12.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FortAwesome/Font-Awesome
Release: Release 5.12.0
Tag: 5.12.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2019-12-10T22:52:51Z; created_at: 2019-12-10T22:52:13Z
Release notes:
### Added
* New science fiction and household icons
* Metadata in Yaml format now available in JS packages
@fortawesome/fontawesome-free and @fortawesome/fontawesome-pro
### Changed
* Updated twitch, safari, pied-piper, and android brand icon
* Renaming haykal icon to bahai
* Added "sideEffects: false" to JS icon packages to aid with tree-shaking
### Fixed
* Improved eye position on the dog icon
* Updated solid style of the shape icon
* Adding missing versions for balance-scale-left and balance-scale-right icons
* Corrected missing cut-outs for envelope-open-dollar and envelope-open-text
which made swap opacity incorrect
* Fixing icon mismatch for contract and expand icons in the version 4 shim
* TypeScript definition includes optional params for layer() API call
* Symbols can now be inserted using Windows Character Map, Word, and PowerPoint
FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#14614
* Correcting the LICENSE.txt for @fortawesome/fontawesome-svg-core and
@fortawesome/fontawesome-common-types
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release 5.12.0, new science fiction and household icons were added, metadata in Yaml format became available in JS packages, and several brand icons were updated including twitch, safari, pied-piper, and android. The haykal icon was renamed to bahai, and 'sideEffects: false' was added to JS icon packages to aid with tree-shaking. Fixes included improved eye position on the dog icon, updated solid style of the shape icon, missing versions for balance-scale-left and balance-scale-right, corrected cut-outs for envelope-open-dollar and envelope-open-text, icon mismatch for contract and expand in the version 4 shim, TypeScript definition for optional params in layer() API, symbol insertion support in Windows Character Map, Word, and PowerPoint, and corrected LICENSE.txt for @fortawesome/fontawesome-svg-core and @fortawesome/fontawesome-common-types.

chunks.title: Release 5.12.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FortAwesome/Font-Awesome
Release: Release 5.12.1
Tag: 5.12.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-02-05T14:37:23Z; created_at: 2020-02-05T14:36:40Z
Release notes:
### Added
* user-unlock icon FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#13280
* mixer brand icon FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#11242
* coffin-cross icon FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#15646
* instagram-square icon FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#9223
* shopify icon FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#3850
* dailymotion icon FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#3890
### Changed
* Do not separate web fonts files for Free Kits
* The .fab CSS class now has explicit weight of 400 instead of inheriting 'normal'
* Balance the plus symbol in file-plus and folder-plus FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#16004
* Removed cross from coffin (new coffin-cross still available) FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#15646
* Updated edge brand icon FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#15771
* Updated clock hands FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#15779
### Fixed
* Guard against run-away pseudo element searching with String.codePointAt ponyfill
* Silence errors when using the conflict detector
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release 5.12.1, new icons added include user-unlock, mixer brand, coffin-cross, instagram-square, shopify, and dailymotion. Changes include no longer separating web font files for Free Kits, setting explicit weight of 400 for .fab CSS class, balancing the plus symbol in file-plus and folder-plus, removing the cross from coffin (with coffin-cross still available), updating the edge brand icon, and updating clock hands. Fixes guard against run-away pseudo element searching with String.codePointAt ponyfill and silence errors when using the conflict detector.

chunks.title: Release 5.13.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FortAwesome/Font-Awesome
Release: Release 5.13.0
Tag: 5.13.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-03-23T18:53:55Z; created_at: 2020-03-23T18:53:09Z
Release notes:
### Added
* New icons related to COVID-19
* Added the ability to specify mask ID and title ID for SVG with JS which allows
snapshot testing tools to get a predictable result when executing tests
### Changed
* Explicitly set font-display to block which supresses warnings of font-display
in tools like Lighthouse
### Fixed
* Corrected version 4 font face shim src attribute declaration that was warning
of incorrect font file format
* Fixed font family name to be 'Font Awesome 5 Free' for free kits when using
pseudo-elements
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release 5.13.0, new icons related to COVID-19 were added, along with the ability to specify mask ID and title ID for SVG with JS for predictable snapshot testing. Changes include explicitly setting font-display to block to suppress warnings in tools like Lighthouse. Fixes correct the version 4 font face shim src attribute declaration warning of incorrect font file format, and set the font family name to 'Font Awesome 5 Free' for free kits when using pseudo-elements.

chunks.title: Release 5.13.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FortAwesome/Font-Awesome
Release: Release 5.13.1
Tag: 5.13.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-06-18T20:53:59Z; created_at: 2020-06-18T20:53:17Z
Release notes:
### Added
* New brand icons deezer, edge-legacy, google-pay, rust, tiktok, and unsplash
* Icons sink, users-slash, bacteria, and bacterium added to Font Awesome Free
### Changed
* Updated brand icons bandcamp, google-plus, tripadvisor, and yahoo
### Fixed
* Icon hand-holding-water missing 5.13.0 in its versions
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release 5.13.1, new brand icons added include deezer, edge-legacy, google-pay, rust, tiktok, and unsplash. Icons sink, users-slash, bacteria, and bacterium were added to Font Awesome Free. Brand icons bandcamp, google-plus, tripadvisor, and yahoo were updated. A fix addressed the missing version 5.13.0 for the hand-holding-water icon.

chunks.title: Release 5.14.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FortAwesome/Font-Awesome
Release: Release 5.14.0
Tag: 5.14.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-07-15T18:04:34Z; created_at: 2020-07-15T18:03:34Z
Release notes:
**Minor version upgrade notice: there are some backward-incompatible changes to this release. See the
[UPGRADING.md guide](https://github.com/FortAwesome/Font-Awesome/blob/master/UPGRADING.md) for more
information.**
### Fixed
* Corrected rendering issue with the tripadvisor brand icon in Windows 10 FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#16817
* Corrected unicode values that were outside the Unicode Private Use Area (PUA) FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#16804
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release 5.14.0, a minor version upgrade with backward-incompatible changes was noted. Fixes include corrected rendering of the tripadvisor brand icon in Windows 10 and corrected unicode values that were outside the Unicode Private Use Area (PUA).

chunks.title: Release 5.15.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FortAwesome/Font-Awesome
Release: Release 5.15.0
Tag: 5.15.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-09-29T13:26:50Z; created_at: 2020-09-29T13:24:01Z
Release notes:
**Minor version upgrade notice: there are some backward-incompatible changes to this release. See the
[UPGRADING.md guide](https://github.com/FortAwesome/Font-Awesome/blob/master/UPGRADING.md) for more
information.**
### Added
* Added guilded, hive, innosoft, instalod, ns8, octopus-deploy, perbyte,
uncharted, watchman-monitoring, wodu sponsored brand icons
* Added commissioned vest and vest-patch icon
* Added cloudflare brand icon
### Changed
* Removed the adobe icon at the request of Adobe
* Update rocketchat brand icon
### Fixed
* Conflict detection now includes Kits when checking for conflicts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release 5.15.0, a minor version upgrade with backward-incompatible changes was noted. Added sponsored brand icons guilded, hive, innosoft, instalod, ns8, octopus-deploy, perbyte, uncharted, watchman-monitoring, wodu, and commissioned vest and vest-patch icons, plus cloudflare brand icon. The adobe icon was removed at Adobe's request, rocketchat brand icon was updated, and conflict detection now includes Kits when checking for conflicts.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FortAwesome/Font-Awesome

Tag: 5.15.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-10-05T16:45:35Z; created_at: 2020-10-05T16:44:11Z
Release notes:
### Changed
* Update to the ravelry brand icon
### Fixed
* Removed fill attribute from the vest and vest-patches icon
* Moved attribution comment to correct location for sprites
* Fixed duotone icons not rendering in Kits
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release 5.15.1, the ravelry brand icon was updated. Fixes removed the fill attribute from vest and vest-patches icons, moved the attribution comment to the correct location for sprites, and fixed duotone icons not rendering in Kits.

chunks.title: Release 5.15.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FortAwesome/Font-Awesome
Release: Release 5.15.4
Tag: 5.15.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2021-08-04T19:10:23Z; created_at: 2021-08-04T19:09:22Z
Release notes:
### Changed
* Removed the tripadvisor brand icon by request of Tripadvisor
* Update bug, bullseye, drone, icons FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#17800 FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#17106 FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#17730
* Update bootstrap, discord, figma, and font-awesome-* brand icons FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#17436
### Fixed
* Made font-family matching case-insensitive for SVG + JavaScript version of Font Awesome FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#17860
* Corrected missing version hospital-user FortAwesome/Font-Awesome#17435
* Removed useless .tgz file in @fortawesome/fontawesome-pro and all @fortawesome/pro-*-svg-icons
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release 5.15.4, the tripadvisor brand icon was removed by request of Tripadvisor. Icons bug, bullseye, drone were updated, and bootstrap, discord, figma, and font-awesome-* brand icons were updated. Fixes made font-family matching case-insensitive for SVG + JavaScript version, corrected missing version for hospital-user, and removed a useless .tgz file in @fortawesome/fontawesome-pro and all @fortawesome/pro-*-svg-icons.

questions.query_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome releases, which release adds the user-unlock, mixer brand, coffin-cross, instagram-square, shopify, and dailymotion icons?

answer_support.answer_text: new icons added include user-unlock, mixer brand, coffin-cross, instagram-square, shopify, and dailymotion

questions.query_text: Across the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome releases, how does the handling of the tripadvisor brand icon differ between release 5.14.0 and release 5.15.4?

options.text: 5.14.0 corrects a rendering issue with the tripadvisor icon in Windows 10, while 5.15.4 removes the tripadvisor brand icon entirely by request of Tripadvisor.
5.14.0 adds the tripadvisor icon, while 5.15.4 updates its design.
Both releases only update the tripadvisor icon without removal.
5.14.0 removes the tripadvisor icon, while 5.15.4 restores it.

questions.expected_answer: 5.14.0 corrects a rendering issue with the tripadvisor icon in Windows 10, while 5.15.4 removes the tripadvisor brand icon entirely by request of Tripadvisor.

answer_support.answer_text: Corrected rendering issue with the tripadvisor brand icon in Windows 10
Removed the tripadvisor brand icon by request of Tripadvisor

questions.query_text: In the FortAwesome/Font-Awesome release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds COVID-19 related icons and the ability to specify mask ID and title ID for SVG with JS, (2) a release that adds new science fiction and household icons and renames haykal to bahai, (3) a release that adds the user-unlock, mixer brand, coffin-cross, instagram-square, shopify, and dailymotion icons.

answer_support.answer_text: new science fiction and household icons were added ... haykal icon was renamed to bahai
new icons added include user-unlock, mixer brand, coffin-cross, instagram-square, shopify, and dailymotion
New icons related to COVID-19 ... ability to specify mask ID and title ID for SVG with JS
